debug_info.goal:
case left.h
f g : ℝ → ℂ
hf : Meromorphic f
hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ g univ
a : ℝ
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun y => log ‖f a - g y‖) (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
have : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun y => f a - g y) Set.univ := analyticOnNhd_const.sub hg
    exact this.log_norm_integrable_Ioc

have hg_cont : Continuous g := hg.continuousOn.comp_continuous continuous_id (fun _ => trivial)
    exact Continuous.integrable_log_norm (continuous_const.sub hg_cont) (by exact isCompact_Icc.measure_lt_top) (Ioc_subset_Icc_self)

    apply MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn.mono_set _ Ioc_subset_Icc_self
    have : IntervalIntegrable (fun y => log ‖f a - g y‖) MeasureTheory.volume 0 (2 * π) := by
      apply intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub_of_continuous
      exact continuous_const.sub hg_cont
    exact this.1

have hg_cont : Continuous g := hg.continuous
    refine MeasureTheory.Integrable.of_norm ?_
    sorry

have hgc : Continuous g := continuous_iff_continuousOn_univ.mpr hg.continuousOn
    exact (continuous_const.sub hgc).integrableOn_Ioc.log_norm

have hg_cont : Continuous g := hg.continuousOn.continuous_of_forall_mem_nhds (fun x _ ↦ isOpen_univ.mem_nhds trivial)
    exact (continuous_const.sub hg_cont).log_norm_integrable_Ioc

have : Continuous (fun y => f a - g y) := continuous_const.sub hg.continuous
    exact log_norm_integrable_Ioc this (by linarith [Real.pi_pos])

apply MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn.integrable_indicator
    · exact integrableOn_log_norm_sub_const (f a) (hg.continuous)
    · exact measurableSet_Ioc

have hg' : Continuous g := hg.continuous
    have h1 : MeasureTheory.LocallyIntegrable (fun y => log ‖f a - g y‖) MeasureTheory.volume := by
      apply MeasureTheory.LocallyIntegrable.comp_continuous
      · exact Real.locallyIntegrable_log_norm_sub (f a)
      · exact hg'

    exact h1.integrableOn_isCompact isCompact_Icc |>.mono_set Ioc_subset_Icc_self

have : MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn (fun y => log ‖f a - g y‖) (Icc 0 (2 * π)) MeasureTheory.volume := by
      have hg' : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ g (Icc 0 (2 * π)) := hg.mono (Set.subset_univ _)
      exact integrableOn_log_norm_sub_of_analyticOnNhd (f a) hg'
    exact MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn.mono_set this Ioc_subset_Icc_self

apply MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn.mono_set
    · exact intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub_const_analyticOnNhd hg (f a) |>.integrableOn
    · exact Ioc_subset_Icc_self

have hg_cont : Continuous g := hg.continuous
    exact intervalIntegral.intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub_of_continuous (hg_cont.sub_left (f a)) |>.integrableOn_Ioc
